languages.original_text: "What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."

languages.text: "Более всего меня интересует, как мирянин смог столь глубоко постичь ксенотехнические секреты. Если он сотворил подобное сам, то, безусловно, его мозг достоин изучения. Если же у него были сподвижники, их нужно безотлагательно обнаружить и опросить".

"What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."
languages.original_text: "Более всего меня интересует, как мирянин смог столь глубоко постичь ксенотехнические секреты. Если он сотворил подобное сам, то, безусловно, его мозг достоин изучения. Если же у него были сподвижники, их нужно безотлагательно обнаружить и опросить".

traits.locale_text: "What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."

"What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."

"What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."

languages.text: «Lo que más me intriga es cómo ha conseguido un laico obtener una comprensión tan profunda de los secretos xenotecnológicos. Si lo ha hecho por sí mismo, su cerebro es digno de estudio. Si tenía socios, deberíamos encontrarlos e interrogarlos ipso facto».
languages.original_text: "What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."

traits.locale_text: «Lo que más me intriga es cómo ha conseguido un laico obtener una comprensión tan profunda de los secretos xenotecnológicos. Si lo ha hecho por sí mismo, su cerebro es digno de estudio. Si tenía socios, deberíamos encontrarlos e interrogarlos ipso facto».

languages.text: 「私が最も興味を抱くのは、いかにして一人の世俗の者が、異星技術の秘密をこれほど深く理解するに至ったか、という点です。もし彼が独力でこのようなものを作り上げたのなら、彼の脳は間違いなく研究に値します。もし協力者がいたのなら、彼らを直ちに見つけ出し、尋問すべきです」
languages.original_text: "What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."

traits.locale_text: 「私が最も興味を抱くのは、いかにして一人の世俗の者が、異星技術の秘密をこれほど深く理解するに至ったか、という点です。もし彼が独力でこのようなものを作り上げたのなら、彼の脳は間違いなく研究に値します。もし協力者がいたのなら、彼らを直ちに見つけ出し、尋問すべきです」

languages.text: “最让我感兴趣的是，一个教外人士，何来对异形科技如此深刻的理解。如果全凭自己摸索，那他的大脑绝对值得研究；如果他有同伙，就应该找到他们并立即审讯。”
languages.original_text: "What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."

traits.locale_text: “最让我感兴趣的是，一个教外人士，何来对异形科技如此深刻的理解。如果全凭自己摸索，那他的大脑绝对值得研究；如果他有同伙，就应该找到他们并立即审讯。”

languages.text: "Mich interessiert vor allem, wie ein Laie ein so tiefes Verständnis für xenotechnische Geheimnisse erlangen konnte. Falls er es sich selbst angeeignet hat, wäre sein Gehirn ein interessantes Studienobjekt. Hatte er Helfer, sollten sie umgehend aufgespürt und befragt werden."
languages.original_text: "What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."

traits.locale_text: "Mich interessiert vor allem, wie ein Laie ein so tiefes Verständnis für xenotechnische Geheimnisse erlangen konnte. Falls er es sich selbst angeeignet hat, wäre sein Gehirn ein interessantes Studienobjekt. Hatte er Helfer, sollten sie umgehend aufgespürt und befragt werden."

languages.text: « Ce qui m'intéresse le plus, c'est de savoir comment un profane a pu atteindre une compréhension aussi vaste des secrets xénotechnologiques. S'il a mis au point lui-même une chose pareille, son cerveau mérite d'être étudié. S'il avait des associés, il faut les retrouver et les interroger sans délai. »
languages.original_text: "What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."

traits.locale_text: « Ce qui m'intéresse le plus, c'est de savoir comment un profane a pu atteindre une compréhension aussi vaste des secrets xénotechnologiques. S'il a mis au point lui-même une chose pareille, son cerveau mérite d'être étudié. S'il avait des associés, il faut les retrouver et les interroger sans délai. »

languages.text: "Beni en çok ilgilendiren, ruhban olmayan birinin zeno teknik sırlar hakkında bu kadar derin bir anlayışa nasıl ulaştığı. Eğer böyle bir şeyi kendisi yaptıysa beyni kesinlikle incelenmeye değer. Eğer ortakları varsa derhâl bulunup sorgulanmalı."
languages.original_text: "What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."
